title: Zeffliffl (species)
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Zeffliffl |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]''[[The Crystal Star]]'' |class=[[Algae/Legends|Algae]] |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Dark green]] |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Group communities |lifespan= |origin=[[Zeffliffl]] |habitat=[[Salt water]] |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|Where do those folks over there come from? And is it a group, or one person?''"
"''Why, a group, of course, sir. They are from the fourth world of Markbee's Star, specifically, from—if I am not mistaken—Zeffliffl.|Han Solo and C-3PO|}} The '''Zeffliffl''' were [[Sentience/Legends|intelligent]], [[Seaweed/Legends|seaweed]]-like [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Zeffliffl]], in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Living in tight-knit groups, the [[Species/Legends|species]] had a subconscious connection with its group members, which rejected any outsiders. A group of Zeffliffl traveled to [[Crseih Station|Crseih Research Station]] in pursuit of healing for a sick groupmate. ==Biology and appearance== The Zeffliffl were a [[Species/Legends|species]] that looked like a lump of [[Color/Legends|dark green]] or blue-black [[Seaweed/Legends|seaweed]]. Several individuals existed together in close groups, such that to outsiders they appeared as a single multi-humped stack. The relationship between groupmates was so strong that any outsiders that tried to join it were automatically rejected in a subconscious manner analogous to an allergic reaction. In their natural environment, the [[Plant/Legends|leaf]]-like beings lived immersed in [[salt water]] so that when they traveled off-world, they carried sacks of [[Salt/Legends|salt]] [[Water/Legends|water]] with them, which they periodically sprayed over themselves in order to maintain hydration. Their [[Language/Legends|language]] sounded like leaves swirled through water. The species also was as intelligent as the average mammalian sentient.{{SW|url=news/welcome-to-the-star-wars-jungle|text=Welcome to the ''Star Wars'' Jungle|int=Welcome to the Star Wars Jungle|nolive=1}} ==History== {{Quote|They say, that their groupmate has returned from the dead. The Zeffliffl said thank you.|C-3PO translates the Zeffliffl response to Waru's healing|}} [[File:Waru.jpg|thumb|200px|The Waru, left, healed a sick Zeffliffl groupmate on Crseih Station.]] The Zeffliffl evolved on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Zeffliffl]], the fourth body [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Markbee's Star]], located within the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] They lived in the shallow, salt water seas surrounding the smaller southern continent of the planet. In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The Crystal Star]]'' to [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]. a group of Zeffliffl traveled to [[Crseih Station]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research station turned bazaar, on a mission to seek healing for an ailing member. The particular Zeffliffl was suffering from a disease, the symptoms of which included sickly yellow-green skin and leaves falling off. Crseih Station was home to the [[Waru]], an [[Waru's universe|extra-dimensional]] being that gained a reputation as a healer. Waru encased the sick member in a golder ichor that solidified and then exploded; the ill Zeffliffl was completely healed and was received back into its group. Present at the healing was the infamous [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] who disputed the veracity of the healing; however, it proved to be genuine. ==Behind the scenes== The Zeffliffl were created in [[1994]] by [[Vonda N. McIntyre]] for her novel ''[[The Crystal Star]]''. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] *''[[The Crystal Star]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/welcome-to-the-star-wars-jungle|text=Welcome to the ''Star Wars'' Jungle|int=Welcome to the Star Wars Jungle|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Botanical sentient species]] [[Category:Outer Rim Territories sentient species]]
